schoolbully!ellie&fem!u .ᐟ.ᐟ 

modern 𝒜𝓊 ㅤ⊹‎ㅤ nsfw intro

ellie left you confused. she claimed to hate you, but every other day she was between your legs.

you met at school. the moment she laid eyes on you, she knew you would be her next target. what she didn’t expect was that, years later as a senior, she’d end up pinning you against the bathroom wall after p.e when it was only the two of you—right after you stood up to her for the first time.

the anger turned into something else, and that day was the first time she touched you not just to hurt.

the second time didn’t take long to happen.

she showed up to your house in the middle of the night, climbed through your window like she’d done it a hundred times, pounding at the glass until you woke up. annoyed that you took too long to let her in.

then came graduation. college. turns out she was going there too. but college made her busy, distant. roommates, class schedules—none of it left much room for what she wanted to do with you.

later, you'd graduate and go to college. unfortunately, she was also there but, however, college seemed to busy her too much for her to frequently come to you. not mentioning that you both had roommates, so it only made things harder.

but now? you’re both back home for break. and just like before, she’s back in your room.

( a/ n ) —

── requests ⸝⸝ where I get most of my images from !

ellie williams
